```{r helpers, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)

# =============================================================================
# Calcium Imaging — Droplet Selector
# =============================================================================
# Run with:  shiny::runApp("calcium_bubble_selector.R")
# Requires:  install.packages(c("shiny", "ggplot2", "dplyr", "DT"))
# =============================================================================

library(shiny)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(DT)

# ── helpers ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

parse_calcium_csv <- function(path) {
  lines <- readLines(path)
  header_idx  <- which(grepl("Field#", lines))[1]
  summary_idx <- which(grepl("Summary Statistics", lines, ignore.case = TRUE))[1]
  end_idx     <- if (!is.na(summary_idx)) summary_idx - 1 else length(lines)
  data_lines  <- lines[(header_idx + 1):end_idx]
  data_lines  <- data_lines[nzchar(trimws(data_lines))]
  rows <- lapply(data_lines, function(l) {
    parts <- strsplit(l, ",")[[1]]
    parts <- parts[nzchar(trimws(parts))]
    if (length(parts) >= 2) {
      frame <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(parts[1]))
      val   <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(parts[2]))
      if (!is.na(frame) && !is.na(val)) return(c(frame, val))
    }
    NULL
  })
  rows <- rows[!sapply(rows, is.null)]
  m    <- do.call(rbind, rows)
  data.frame(frame = m[, 1], intensity = m[, 2])
}

auto_detect_oxygen <- function(df) {
  vals   <- df$intensity
  frames <- df$frame
  n      <- length(vals)
  diffs  <- c(0, diff(vals))
  pos_diffs <- diffs[diffs > 0]
  if (length(pos_diffs) == 0)
    return(data.frame(start_frame=numeric(0), end_frame=numeric(0)))
  p99       <- quantile(pos_diffs, 0.99)
  threshold <- max(10 * p99, 50)
  raw_starts <- which(diffs > threshold)
  if (length(raw_starts) == 0)
    return(data.frame(start_frame=numeric(0), end_frame=numeric(0)))
  starts <- raw_starts[1]
  for (i in seq_along(raw_starts)[-1])
    if (raw_starts[i] - tail(starts, 1) > 5) starts <- c(starts, raw_starts[i])
  bubbles <- lapply(starts, function(si) {
    pre_val   <- vals[max(1, si - 1)]
    end_idx   <- min(si + 400, n)
    for (j in seq(si + 1, min(si + 400, n)))
      if (vals[j] <= pre_val * 1.15) { end_idx <- j - 1; break }
    data.frame(start_frame = frames[si], end_frame = frames[end_idx])
  })
  do.call(rbind, bubbles)
}

auto_assign_phases <- function(drops, n_pre=7, n_stim=1) {
  if (nrow(drops) == 0) return(drops)
  drops_sorted <- drops[order(drops$start_frame), ]
  n <- nrow(drops_sorted)
  phases <- character(n)
  for (i in seq_len(n)) {
    if (i <= n_pre)            phases[i] <- "pre"
    else if (i <= n_pre + n_stim) phases[i] <- "stim"
    else                       phases[i] <- "post"
  }
  drops_sorted$phase <- phases
  # re-merge back in original order
  drops$phase <- phases[match(drops$id, drops_sorted$id)]
  drops
}

phase_color <- function(phase) {
  switch(phase,
    pre      = "#185FA5",   # blue
    stim     = "#c47d00",   # amber
    post     = "#27ae60",   # green
    excluded = "#aaaaaa",   # grey
    "#993556"               # fallback
  )
}

phase_fill <- function(phase) {
  switch(phase,
    pre      = "rgba(24,95,165,0.18)",
    stim     = "rgba(196,125,0,0.22)",
    post     = "rgba(39,174,96,0.18)",
    excluded = "rgba(170,170,170,0.12)",
    "rgba(153,53,86,0.22)"
  )
}

remove_oxygen <- function(df, oxy_df) {
  if (is.null(oxy_df) || nrow(oxy_df) == 0) return(df)
  keep <- rep(TRUE, nrow(df))
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(oxy_df)))
    keep <- keep & !(df$frame >= oxy_df$start_frame[i] &
                     df$frame <= oxy_df$end_frame[i])
  df[keep, ]
}

# ── JavaScript ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Controls:
#   Left-click drag  → Shiny brush (region selection) — native, no JS needed
#   Right-click drag → pan left/right
#   Scroll wheel     → zoom in/out centred on cursor
#   Spacebar         → add current brush selection as a droplet region
#   Escape           → clear brush / deselect current drop

nav_js <- HTML('
<script>
var CA = {
  minF:1, maxF:1, viewLo:1, viewHi:1,
  panning:false,
  panStartX:0, panStartLo:0, panStartHi:0,
  marginLeft:60, marginRight:20,
  hasBrush: false    // track whether a brush selection exists
};

window.caInit = function(mn,mx,lo,hi){
  CA.minF=mn; CA.maxF=mx; CA.viewLo=lo; CA.viewHi=hi;
};

function pushRange(){
  Shiny.setInputValue("js_view",
    {lo:Math.round(CA.viewLo), hi:Math.round(CA.viewHi)},
    {priority:"event"});
}

function applyView(lo,hi){
  var span=hi-lo; if(span<20){hi=lo+20;}
  if(lo<CA.minF){lo=CA.minF; hi=lo+span;}
  if(hi>CA.maxF){hi=CA.maxF; lo=hi-span;}
  if(lo<CA.minF) lo=CA.minF;
  if(hi>CA.maxF) hi=CA.maxF;
  CA.viewLo=lo; CA.viewHi=hi; pushRange();
}

function xToFrame(clientX){
  var el=document.getElementById("plot_main"); if(!el) return CA.viewLo;
  var rect=el.getBoundingClientRect();
  var plotW=rect.width-CA.marginLeft-CA.marginRight;
  var frac=(clientX-rect.left-CA.marginLeft)/plotW;
  return CA.viewLo+Math.max(0,Math.min(1,frac))*(CA.viewHi-CA.viewLo);
}

// Update the hint bar text
function setHint(txt){
  var h=document.getElementById("hint_bar"); if(h) h.textContent=txt;
}

$(document).ready(function(){

  Shiny.addCustomMessageHandler("caInit",function(m){
    window.caInit(m.mn,m.mx,m.lo,m.hi);
  });
  // Called by R when brush is cleared after adding a region
  Shiny.addCustomMessageHandler("clearBrush",function(m){
    CA.hasBrush=false;
    setHint("Left-drag to select a region  ·  Space to add  ·  Right-drag to pan  ·  Scroll to zoom");
  });

  // ── Keyboard shortcuts ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
  $(document).on("keydown",function(e){
    if(e.target.tagName==="INPUT"||e.target.tagName==="TEXTAREA") return;

    // Space → add droplet (only if a brush exists)
    if(e.key===" "||e.keyCode===32){
      e.preventDefault();
      Shiny.setInputValue("space_add",Date.now(),{priority:"event"});
      return;
    }
    // Escape → clear selection / deselect editing drop
    if(e.key==="Escape"){
      e.preventDefault();
      Shiny.setInputValue("escape_key",Date.now(),{priority:"event"});
      return;
    }
  });

  // ── Scroll to zoom ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  $("#plot_wrap").on("wheel",function(e){
    e.preventDefault();
    var oe=e.originalEvent;
    var factor=oe.deltaY>0?1.18:0.85;
    var mouseF=xToFrame(oe.clientX);
    var span=CA.viewHi-CA.viewLo;
    var newSpan=Math.max(20,Math.min(CA.maxF-CA.minF,span*factor));
    var ratio=span>0?(mouseF-CA.viewLo)/span:0.5;
    applyView(mouseF-ratio*newSpan, mouseF-ratio*newSpan+newSpan);
  });

  // ── Right-click drag to pan ────────────────────────────────────────────
  // Use the transparent overlay for right-click so we don\'t block Shiny\'s
  // left-button brush. The overlay is always present but pointer-events
  // are set to none for left clicks so Shiny brush still works underneath.
  var wrap = document.getElementById("plot_wrap");

  wrap.addEventListener("mousedown",function(e){
    if(e.button!==2) return;   // right button only
    e.preventDefault();
    CA.panning=true;
    CA.panStartX=e.clientX;
    CA.panStartLo=CA.viewLo;
    CA.panStartHi=CA.viewHi;
    wrap.style.cursor="grabbing";
  });

  document.addEventListener("mousemove",function(e){
    if(!CA.panning) return;
    var el=document.getElementById("plot_main"); if(!el) return;
    var rect=el.getBoundingClientRect();
    var plotW=rect.width-CA.marginLeft-CA.marginRight;
    if(plotW<=0) return;
    var span=CA.panStartHi-CA.panStartLo;
    var dFrame=-((e.clientX-CA.panStartX)/plotW)*span;
    applyView(CA.panStartLo+dFrame, CA.panStartHi+dFrame);
  });

  document.addEventListener("mouseup",function(e){
    if(!CA.panning) return;
    CA.panning=false;
    wrap.style.cursor="crosshair";
  });

  // Suppress the browser context menu on the plot so right-click drag works cleanly
  wrap.addEventListener("contextmenu",function(e){ e.preventDefault(); });

  window.addEventListener("blur",function(){ CA.panning=false; });

  // Track whether brush has been drawn (to show/hide hint)
  // Shiny fires a brushed event on the plot — we watch for any mouse-up after
  // a left-drag on the plot to flag that a selection may exist
  var leftDown=false;
  wrap.addEventListener("mousedown",function(e){
    if(e.button===0) leftDown=true;
  });
  document.addEventListener("mouseup",function(e){
    if(leftDown && e.button===0){
      leftDown=false;
      // small delay so Shiny has time to update input$brush
      setTimeout(function(){
        CA.hasBrush=true;
        setHint("Selection ready — press Space to add as droplet  ·  or drag again to redraw");
      },150);
    }
  });

});
</script>
')

# ── UI ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

ui <- fluidPage(
  tags$head(
    tags$style(HTML("
      body { font-family:'Helvetica Neue',sans-serif; font-size:13px; }
      .well { padding:12px; background:#f8f8f8; border:1px solid #e0e0e0; }
      .btn-primary { background-color:#2c6fad; border-color:#2c6fad; }
      .btn-danger  { background-color:#c0392b; border-color:#c0392b; }
      .btn-success { background-color:#27ae60; border-color:#27ae60; }
      .btn-warning { background-color:#e67e22; border-color:#e67e22; color:white; }
      h4 { margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:8px; font-weight:500; }
      #plot_wrap { position:relative; display:block; width:100%;
                   cursor:crosshair; user-select:none; }
      #plot_main { display:block; width:100%; }
      .oxy-pill      { background:#ba7517; color:white; padding:1px 7px;
                       border-radius:3px; font-size:11px; font-weight:500; }
      .drop-pill     { background:#993556; color:white; padding:1px 7px;
                       border-radius:3px; font-size:11px; font-weight:500; }
      .phase-pre     { background:#185FA5; }
      .phase-stim    { background:#c47d00; }
      .phase-post    { background:#27ae60; }
      .phase-excl    { background:#aaaaaa; }
      .hint-bar  { background:#e8f0fb; border-left:3px solid #2c6fad;
                   padding:6px 12px; font-size:12px; color:#2c4a7a;
                   margin-bottom:8px; border-radius:0 4px 4px 0; }
      .legend-row { display:flex; gap:16px; font-size:12px; color:#555;
                    margin-bottom:6px; align-items:center; }
      .leg-swatch { width:12px; height:12px; border-radius:2px; display:inline-block;
                    margin-right:4px; vertical-align:middle; }
      /* region table */
      .drop-row { cursor:pointer; transition:background 0.1s; }
      .drop-row:hover { background:#fdf0f5; }
      .drop-row.selected { background:#f5d6e4 !important; }
      /* prevent DataTable from stealing spacebar focus */
      .dataTables_wrapper { outline: none; }
      table.dataTable { outline: none; }
      table.dataTable td, table.dataTable th { outline: none; }
      /* edit panel */
      .edit-panel { background:#fdf0f5; border:1.5px solid #d88aaa;
                    border-radius:6px; padding:12px 14px; margin-top:10px; }
      .edit-panel .edit-title { font-weight:500; color:#6b1f3a;
                                font-size:13px; margin-bottom:6px; }
      .edit-panel .edit-hint  { font-size:11px; color:#777; margin-bottom:10px; }
      .edit-frames { font-size:13px; font-family:monospace; color:#444;
                     background:#fff; border:1px solid #d88aaa; border-radius:4px;
                     padding:4px 10px; margin-bottom:10px; display:inline-block; }
    ")),
    nav_js
  ),

  titlePanel("Calcium Imaging — Droplet Selector"),

  sidebarLayout(
    sidebarPanel(width = 3,

      wellPanel(
        h4("1. Load data"),
        fileInput("file", NULL, accept = ".csv",
                  buttonLabel = "Browse…", placeholder = "No file selected"),
        checkboxInput("auto_oxy", "Auto-remove oxygen bubbles", value = TRUE),
        uiOutput("oxy_status")
      ),

      conditionalPanel("output.data_loaded",
        wellPanel(
          h4("2. Navigate"),
          tags$p(style="font-size:11px;color:#555;line-height:1.6;margin:0;",
            HTML("🖱 <b>Left-drag</b> — draw selection<br>
                  🖱 <b>Right-drag</b> — pan left/right<br>
                  🖱 <b>Scroll</b> — zoom in/out<br>
                  ⌨ <b>Space</b> — add selection as droplet<br>
                  ⌨ <b>Esc</b> — cancel / deselect")),
          br(),
          actionButton("reset_zoom","⟳ Reset zoom", width="100%",
                       class="btn btn-default btn-sm")
        ),

        wellPanel(
          h4("3. Mark droplets / media"),
          tags$p(style="font-size:11px;color:#777;margin-bottom:8px;",
            "Drag to select, then press Space or click Add:"),
          actionButton("add_region","✚ Add droplet",
                       class="btn-primary", width="100%"),
          br(), br(),
          actionButton("undo_last","↩ Undo last",          class="btn-warning", width="100%"),
          br(), br(),
          actionButton("clear_drops","✕ Clear all",          class="btn-danger",  width="100%")
        ),

        wellPanel(
          h4("4. Export"),
          tags$p(style="font-size:11px;color:#777;margin-bottom:6px;",
            "Exports only your marked regions. Original frame numbers preserved."),
          downloadButton("dl_cleaned","Download marked regions CSV", class="btn-success"),
          br(), br(),
          downloadButton("dl_regions","Download region table",        class="btn-success")
        )
      )
    ),

    mainPanel(width = 9,
      conditionalPanel("!output.data_loaded",
        div(style="background:#eaf3de;border-left:3px solid #3b6d11;
                   padding:8px 12px;font-size:12px;",
            "👆 Upload a CSV file exported from ImageJ/FIJI Field Data to get started.")
      ),

      conditionalPanel("output.data_loaded",
        tabsetPanel(id="main_tabs",

          # ── Tab 1: Selector ──────────────────────────────────────────────
          tabPanel("Droplet Selector",

            br(),

            # Hint bar + view info
            fluidRow(
              column(8,
                div(class="hint-bar", id="hint_bar",
                  "Left-drag to select a region  ·  Space to add  ·  Right-drag to pan  ·  Scroll to zoom")
              ),
              column(4, style="text-align:right; padding-top:4px;",
                uiOutput("view_info"))
            ),

            # Legend
            div(class="legend-row",
              tags$span(
                tags$span(class="leg-swatch",
                  style="background:rgba(186,117,23,0.35);border:1px solid #ba7517;"),
                "O\u2082 (removed)"),
              tags$span(
                tags$span(class="leg-swatch",
                  style="background:rgba(24,95,165,0.35);border:1px solid #185FA5;"),
                "Pre-stim"),
              tags$span(
                tags$span(class="leg-swatch",
                  style="background:rgba(196,125,0,0.35);border:1px solid #c47d00;"),
                "Stimulus"),
              tags$span(
                tags$span(class="leg-swatch",
                  style="background:rgba(39,174,96,0.35);border:1px solid #27ae60;"),
                "Post-stim"),
              tags$span(
                tags$span(class="leg-swatch",
                  style="background:rgba(170,170,170,0.35);border:1px solid #aaa;"),
                "Excluded"),
              tags$span(style="color:#888;font-size:11px;margin-left:8px;",
                "— click a phase pill in the table to cycle its label")
            ),

            # Plot
            div(id="plot_wrap",
              plotOutput("plot_main", height="360px",
                         brush=brushOpts(id="brush", direction="x",
                                         resetOnNew=TRUE, opacity=0.15))
            ),

            hr(),

            fluidRow(column(12,
              h4("Marked droplet regions  —  click a row to edit"),
              uiOutput("region_table_ui"),
              br()
            )),

            fluidRow(column(12,
              h4("Per-region summary"),
              DTOutput("summary_table")
            ))
          ),

          # ── Tab 2: Cleaned data preview ──────────────────────────────────
          tabPanel("Cleaned Data Preview",

            br(),

            conditionalPanel(
              "output.has_drops",
              div(class="legend-row",
                tags$span(
                  tags$span(class="leg-swatch",
                    style="background:rgba(24,95,165,0.5);border:1px solid #185FA5;"),
                  "Pre-stim"),
                tags$span(
                  tags$span(class="leg-swatch",
                    style="background:rgba(196,125,0,0.5);border:1px solid #c47d00;"),
                  "Stimulus"),
                tags$span(
                  tags$span(class="leg-swatch",
                    style="background:rgba(39,174,96,0.5);border:1px solid #27ae60;"),
                  "Post-stim"),
                tags$span(style="color:#888;font-size:11px;margin-left:8px;",
                  "— excluded droplets and non-droplet frames are hidden")
              ),
              plotOutput("plot_cleaned", height="400px"),
              hr(),
              tags$p(style="font-size:11px;color:#888;margin-bottom:4px;",
                "This is exactly what will be exported to CSV (frame-by-frame intensity for included droplets only)."),
              DTOutput("cleaned_table")
            ),

            conditionalPanel(
              "!output.has_drops",
              div(style="background:#f5f5f5;border-left:3px solid #ccc;
                         padding:10px 14px;font-size:12px;color:#777;margin-top:10px;",
                "No droplets marked yet — go to the Droplet Selector tab to mark regions.")
            )
          ),

          # ── Tab 3: Decay regression ──────────────────────────────────────
          tabPanel("Decay Regression",

            br(),

            conditionalPanel("output.has_drops",

              fluidRow(
                column(4,
                  wellPanel(
                    h4("Select droplets for fit"),
                    tags$p(style="font-size:11px;color:#777;margin-bottom:8px;",
                      "Check the droplets to include in the one-phase decay fit.
                       Tip: typically pre-stim + last post-stim."),
                    uiOutput("decay_drop_picker"),
                    br(),
                    actionButton("run_decay", "▶ Run one-phase decay",
                                 class="btn-primary", width="100%")
                  )
                ),
                column(8,
                  uiOutput("decay_results_ui")
                )
              )
            ),

            conditionalPanel("!output.has_drops",
              div(style="background:#f5f5f5;border-left:3px solid #ccc;
                         padding:10px 14px;font-size:12px;color:#777;margin-top:10px;",
                "No droplets marked yet — go to the Droplet Selector tab to mark regions.")
            )
          ),

          # ── Tab 4: SBR Analysis ──────────────────────────────────────────
          tabPanel("SBR Analysis",

            br(),

            conditionalPanel("output.has_decay",

              fluidRow(
                column(3,
                  wellPanel(
                    h4("SBR settings"),
                    tags$p(style="font-size:11px;color:#777;margin-bottom:8px;",
                      "Select which droplets to include in the background
                       (pre-stim) and which to plot as signal."),
                    uiOutput("sbr_prestim_picker"),
                    hr(),
                    uiOutput("sbr_signal_picker"),
                    br(),
                    actionButton("run_sbr", "▶ Compute SBR",
                                 class="btn-primary", width="100%")
                  )
                ),
                column(9,
                  uiOutput("sbr_results_ui")
                )
              )
            ),

            conditionalPanel("!output.has_decay",
              div(style="background:#f5f5f5;border-left:3px solid #ccc;
                         padding:10px 14px;font-size:12px;color:#777;margin-top:10px;",
                "Run the one-phase decay fit first (Decay Regression tab) before computing SBR.")
            )
          ),

          # ── Tab 5: SBR Boxplot ────────────────────────────────────────────
          tabPanel("SBR Boxplot",

            br(),

            conditionalPanel("output.has_sbr",
              plotOutput("sbr_boxplot", height="450px"),
              br(),
              h4("Wilcoxon rank-sum tests vs Stimulus"),
              tags$p(style="font-size:11px;color:#777;margin-bottom:6px;",
                "Each droplet compared to the stimulus droplet. p-values adjusted with Benjamini-Hochberg (FDR)."),
              DTOutput("sbr_stats_table"),
              br(),
              downloadButton("dl_sbr_plot",  "Download plot (PNG)", class="btn-success"),
              tags$span(style="display:inline-block;width:10px;"),
              downloadButton("dl_sbr_stats", "Download stats CSV",  class="btn-success")
            ),

            conditionalPanel("!output.has_sbr",
              div(style="background:#f5f5f5;border-left:3px solid #ccc;
                         padding:10px 14px;font-size:12px;color:#777;margin-top:10px;",
                "Run the SBR Analysis first before viewing the boxplot.")
            )
          )
        )
      )
    )
  )
)

# ── Server ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

server <- function(input, output, session) {

  rv <- reactiveValues(
    df          = NULL,
    oxy_df      = NULL,
    frame_min   = 1, frame_max = 1,
    view_lo     = 1, view_hi   = 1,
    selected_id = NULL,
    drops       = data.frame(
      id=integer(0), start_frame=numeric(0),
      end_frame=numeric(0), n_frames=integer(0),
      phase=character(0),
      stringsAsFactors=FALSE
    ),
    next_id = 1L
  )

  # ── Load file ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  observeEvent(input$file, {
    req(input$file)
    df <- tryCatch(parse_calcium_csv(input$file$datapath), error=function(e) NULL)
    validate(need(!is.null(df), "Could not parse file. Make sure it is a Field Data CSV."))
    fmin <- min(df$frame); fmax <- max(df$frame)
    rv$df <- df; rv$frame_min <- fmin; rv$frame_max <- fmax
    rv$view_lo <- fmin; rv$view_hi <- fmax
    rv$drops  <- rv$drops[0,]; rv$next_id <- 1L; rv$selected_id <- NULL
    rv$oxy_df <- if (isTRUE(input$auto_oxy)) auto_detect_oxygen(df) else
                   data.frame(start_frame=numeric(0), end_frame=numeric(0))
    session$sendCustomMessage("caInit", list(mn=fmin,mx=fmax,lo=fmin,hi=fmax))
  })

  observeEvent(input$auto_oxy, {
    req(rv$df)
    rv$oxy_df <- if (isTRUE(input$auto_oxy)) auto_detect_oxygen(rv$df) else
                   data.frame(start_frame=numeric(0), end_frame=numeric(0))
  })

  output$data_loaded <- reactive(!is.null(rv$df))
  outputOptions(output, "data_loaded", suspendWhenHidden=FALSE)

  output$has_drops <- reactive({
    !is.null(rv$df) && nrow(rv$drops) > 0 &&
      any(rv$drops$phase != "excluded")
  })
  outputOptions(output, "has_drops", suspendWhenHidden=FALSE)

  # ── Decay tab: drop picker ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
  output$decay_drop_picker <- renderUI({
    req(rv$drops)
    d <- rv$drops[rv$drops$phase != "excluded", ]
    d <- d[order(d$start_frame), ]
    if (nrow(d) == 0) return(tags$p("No included droplets yet."))

    # default: all pre + last post
    last_post <- tail(d$id[d$phase == "post"], 1)
    pre_ids   <- d$id[d$phase == "pre"]
    default   <- c(pre_ids, last_post)

    checkboxGroupInput(
      "decay_drop_ids", label = NULL,
      choiceNames  = lapply(seq_len(nrow(d)), function(i) {
        r    <- d[i, ]
        ph   <- r$phase
        pcol <- phase_color(ph)
        pill <- switch(ph, pre="Pre-stim", stim="Stimulus", post="Post-stim", ph)
        tags$span(
          tags$span(style=sprintf(
            "background:%s;color:white;padding:1px 6px;border-radius:3px;
             font-size:11px;font-weight:500;margin-right:6px;", pcol), pill),
          sprintf("Drop %d  (frames %d–%d)", r$id, r$start_frame, r$end_frame)
        )
      }),
      choiceValues = d$id,
      selected     = default
    )
  })

  # ── Decay fit reactive ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  decay_fit <- eventReactive(input$run_decay, {
    req(rv$df, input$decay_drop_ids)
    ids <- as.integer(input$decay_drop_ids)
    if (length(ids) < 2) return(list(error="Select at least 2 droplets."))

    d  <- rv$drops[rv$drops$id %in% ids, ]
    df <- rv$df
    pts <- do.call(rbind, lapply(seq_len(nrow(d)), function(i) {
      df[df$frame >= d$start_frame[i] & df$frame <= d$end_frame[i], ]
    }))
    if (nrow(pts) < 4) return(list(error="Not enough data points to fit."))

    x <- pts$frame
    y <- pts$intensity

    # one-phase decay: Y = (Y0 - Plateau) * exp(-K * x) + Plateau
    # K constrained > 0 via lower bound in nls
    y0_init  <- max(y)
    pl_init  <- min(y)
    k_init   <- 0.001

    fit <- tryCatch(
      nls(y ~ (Y0 - Plateau) * exp(-K * x) + Plateau,
          start   = list(Y0=y0_init, Plateau=pl_init, K=k_init),
          lower   = list(Y0=-Inf,    Plateau=-Inf,     K=0),
          algorithm = "port",
          control = nls.control(maxiter=1000, warnOnly=TRUE)),
      error = function(e) e
    )

    if (inherits(fit, "error"))
      return(list(error=paste("Fit failed:", conditionMessage(fit))))

    co    <- coef(fit)
    yhat  <- predict(fit)
    ss_res <- sum((y - yhat)^2)
    ss_tot <- sum((y - mean(y))^2)
    r2    <- 1 - ss_res / ss_tot
    syx   <- sqrt(ss_res / (length(y) - 3))
    t_half <- log(2) / co["K"]

    list(
      fit    = fit,
      pts    = pts,
      coef   = co,
      r2     = r2,
      syx    = syx,
      ss_res = ss_res,
      t_half = t_half,
      error  = NULL
    )
  })

  # ── Decay results UI ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  output$decay_results_ui <- renderUI({
    res <- decay_fit()
    if (is.null(res)) return(tags$p(style="color:#888;", "Run the fit to see results."))
    if (!is.null(res$error))
      return(div(style="background:#fdecea;border-left:3px solid #c0392b;
                        padding:10px 14px;font-size:12px;color:#7a1a1a;margin-top:4px;",
                 res$error))
    tagList(
      plotOutput("decay_plot", height="380px"),
      br(),
      h4("Fit parameters"),
      DTOutput("decay_params_table")
    )
  })

  output$decay_plot <- renderPlot({
    res <- decay_fit(); req(res, is.null(res$error))
    pts  <- res$pts
    co   <- res$coef
    xseq <- seq(min(pts$frame), max(pts$frame), length.out=500)
    yseq <- (co["Y0"] - co["Plateau"]) * exp(-co["K"] * xseq) + co["Plateau"]
    fit_line <- data.frame(frame=xseq, intensity=yseq)

    # colour points by phase
    pts$phase <- sapply(pts$frame, function(f) {
      idx <- which(rv$drops$start_frame <= f & rv$drops$end_frame >= f)
      if (length(idx) == 0) "pre" else rv$drops$phase[idx[1]]
    })
    phase_cols <- c(pre="#185FA5", stim="#c47d00", post="#27ae60")

    ggplot(pts, aes(x=frame, y=intensity, color=phase)) +
      geom_point(size=1.2, alpha=0.7) +
      geom_line(data=fit_line, aes(x=frame, y=intensity),
                color="#e74c3c", linewidth=1.1, inherit.aes=FALSE) +
      scale_color_manual(values=phase_cols,
        labels=c(pre="Pre-stim", stim="Stimulus", post="Post-stim"), name=NULL) +
      theme_minimal(base_size=12) +
      theme(
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major = element_line(color="grey92"),
        axis.title       = element_text(size=11, color="grey40"),
        legend.position  = "top",
        plot.title       = element_text(size=12, face="plain", color="grey35")
      ) +
      labs(x="Frame #", y="Pixel Intensity",
           title="One-phase decay fit")
  }, res=110)

  output$decay_params_table <- renderDT({
    res <- decay_fit(); req(res, is.null(res$error))
    co <- res$coef
    params <- data.frame(
      Parameter = c("Y0", "Plateau", "K", "Half-life (frames)", "R²", "Sy.x", "SS residual"),
      Value     = c(
        round(co["Y0"],      4),
        round(co["Plateau"], 4),
        round(co["K"],       6),
        round(res$t_half,    2),
        round(res$r2,        5),
        round(res$syx,       4),
        round(res$ss_res,    2)
      )
    )
    datatable(params, rownames=FALSE,
              options=list(dom="t", pageLength=10, ordering=FALSE, tabIndex=-1))
  })

  output$has_decay <- reactive({
    res <- tryCatch(decay_fit(), error=function(e) NULL)
    !is.null(res) && is.null(res$error)
  })
  outputOptions(output, "has_decay", suspendWhenHidden=FALSE)

  # ── SBR: pre-stim picker ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
  output$sbr_prestim_picker <- renderUI({
    req(rv$drops)
    pre <- rv$drops[rv$drops$phase == "pre", ]
    pre <- pre[order(pre$start_frame), ]
    if (nrow(pre) == 0) return(tags$p("No pre-stim droplets found."))
    tagList(
      tags$p(style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:#444;margin-bottom:4px;",
             "Pre-stim droplets for background:"),
      checkboxGroupInput("sbr_pre_ids", label=NULL,
        choiceNames  = lapply(seq_len(nrow(pre)), function(i)
          sprintf("Drop %d  (frames %d–%d)", pre$id[i], pre$start_frame[i], pre$end_frame[i])),
        choiceValues = pre$id,
        selected     = pre$id
      )
    )
  })

  # ── SBR: signal droplet picker ────────────────────────────────────────────
  output$sbr_signal_picker <- renderUI({
    req(rv$drops)
    sig <- rv$drops[rv$drops$phase %in% c("pre","stim","post"), ]
    sig <- sig[order(sig$start_frame), ]
    if (nrow(sig) == 0) return(tags$p("No droplets to plot."))

    # defaults: last pre, stim, all post
    last_pre  <- tail(sig$id[sig$phase == "pre"],  1)
    stim_ids  <- sig$id[sig$phase == "stim"]
    post_ids  <- sig$id[sig$phase == "post"]
    default   <- c(last_pre, stim_ids, post_ids)

    tagList(
      tags$p(style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:#444;margin-bottom:4px;",
             "Droplets to plot (signal):"),
      checkboxGroupInput("sbr_sig_ids", label=NULL,
        choiceNames = lapply(seq_len(nrow(sig)), function(i) {
          r    <- sig[i,]
          ph   <- r$phase
          pcol <- phase_color(ph)
          pill <- switch(ph, pre="Pre-stim", stim="Stimulus", post="Post-stim", ph)
          tags$span(
            tags$span(style=sprintf(
              "background:%s;color:white;padding:1px 6px;border-radius:3px;
               font-size:11px;font-weight:500;margin-right:6px;", pcol), pill),
            sprintf("Drop %d  (frames %d–%d)", r$id, r$start_frame, r$end_frame)
          )
        }),
        choiceValues = sig$id,
        selected     = default
      )
    )
  })

  # ── SBR computation ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  sbr_result <- eventReactive(input$run_sbr, {
    req(rv$df, decay_fit(), input$sbr_pre_ids, input$sbr_sig_ids)
    res <- decay_fit()
    if (!is.null(res$error)) return(list(error=res$error))

    co  <- res$coef
    df  <- rv$df
    d   <- rv$drops

    # curve value for every frame
    df$curve <- (co["Y0"] - co["Plateau"]) * exp(-co["K"] * df$frame) + co["Plateau"]
    df$ratio  <- df$intensity / df$curve

    # helper: get ratio values for a droplet, cropped to min_frames
    get_ratio <- function(id, min_frames) {
      r    <- d[d$id == id, ]
      rows <- df[df$frame >= r$start_frame & df$frame <= r$end_frame, "ratio"]
      rows[seq_len(min(length(rows), min_frames))]
    }

    pre_ids <- as.integer(input$sbr_pre_ids)
    sig_ids <- as.integer(input$sbr_sig_ids)

    # find min frame count across ALL selected droplets (pre + signal)
    all_ids    <- unique(c(pre_ids, sig_ids))
    frame_counts <- sapply(all_ids, function(id) {
      r <- d[d$id == id, ]
      nrow(df[df$frame >= r$start_frame & df$frame <= r$end_frame, ])
    })
    min_frames <- min(frame_counts)

    # build pre-stim matrix (rows = frame position, cols = droplets)
    pre_mat <- do.call(cbind, lapply(pre_ids, get_ratio, min_frames=min_frames))

    # background = row-wise mean across pre-stim droplets
    background <- rowMeans(pre_mat, na.rm=TRUE)

    # signal droplets: ratio - background (position-matched)
    sig_list <- lapply(sig_ids, function(id) {
      rat  <- get_ratio(id, min_frames)
      r    <- d[d$id == id, ]
      data.frame(
        drop_id    = id,
        phase      = r$phase,
        position   = seq_along(rat),
        ratio      = rat,
        background = background[seq_along(rat)],
        sbr        = rat - background[seq_along(rat)]
      )
    })
    sig_df <- do.call(rbind, sig_list)

    list(
      sig_df     = sig_df,
      background = background,
      min_frames = min_frames,
      pre_ids    = pre_ids,
      sig_ids    = sig_ids,
      error      = NULL
    )
  })

  # ── SBR results UI ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  output$sbr_results_ui <- renderUI({
    res <- sbr_result()
    if (is.null(res)) return(tags$p(style="color:#888;margin-top:10px;",
                                    "Configure settings and click Compute SBR."))
    if (!is.null(res$error))
      return(div(style="background:#fdecea;border-left:3px solid #c0392b;
                        padding:10px 14px;font-size:12px;color:#7a1a1a;",
                 res$error))
    tagList(
      tags$p(style="font-size:11px;color:#888;margin-bottom:4px;",
        sprintf("All droplets cropped to %d frames (shortest selected droplet).",
                res$min_frames)),
      plotOutput("sbr_plot", height="420px"),
      br(),
      h4("SBR values table"),
      DTOutput("sbr_table"),
      br(),
      downloadButton("dl_sbr", "Download SBR CSV", class="btn-success")
    )
  })

  # ── SBR plot ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  output$sbr_plot <- renderPlot({
    res <- sbr_result(); req(res, is.null(res$error))
    sig_df <- res$sig_df
    phase_cols <- c(pre="#185FA5", stim="#c47d00", post="#27ae60")

    # label each drop nicely
    sig_df$label <- sapply(seq_len(nrow(sig_df)), function(i) {
      ph  <- sig_df$phase[i]
      id  <- sig_df$drop_id[i]
      switch(ph,
        pre  = sprintf("Pre-stim %d", id),
        stim = sprintf("Stimulus %d", id),
        post = sprintf("Post-stim %d", id),
        sprintf("Drop %d", id))
    })
    sig_df$drop_fac <- factor(sig_df$drop_id)

    ggplot(sig_df, aes(x=position, y=sbr, color=phase, group=drop_fac)) +
      geom_line(linewidth=0.9) +
      geom_point(size=1.5, alpha=0.8) +
      geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype="dashed", color="grey60", linewidth=0.6) +
      scale_color_manual(values=phase_cols,
        labels=c(pre="Pre-stim", stim="Stimulus", post="Post-stim"), name=NULL) +
      theme_minimal(base_size=12) +
      theme(
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major = element_line(color="grey92"),
        axis.title       = element_text(size=11, color="grey40"),
        legend.position  = "top",
        plot.title       = element_text(size=12, face="plain", color="grey35")
      ) +
      labs(x="Frame position within droplet", y="SBR  (ratio − background)",
           title="Signal-to-Background Ratio — background subtracted")
  }, res=110)

  # ── SBR table ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  output$sbr_table <- renderDT({
    res <- sbr_result(); req(res, is.null(res$error))
    d <- res$sig_df
    d$phase <- factor(d$phase,
      levels=c("pre","stim","post"),
      labels=c("Pre-stim","Stimulus","Post-stim"))
    d$ratio      <- round(d$ratio,      6)
    d$background <- round(d$background, 6)
    d$sbr        <- round(d$sbr,        6)
    datatable(d[, c("drop_id","phase","position","ratio","background","sbr")],
      rownames=FALSE,
      options=list(dom="tp", pageLength=20, scrollX=TRUE, tabIndex=-1),
      colnames=c("Drop ID","Phase","Position","Ratio (H)","Background (X)","SBR (Y–AE)"))
  })

  # ── SBR download ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  output$dl_sbr <- downloadHandler(
    filename = function()
      paste0(tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(input$file$name)), "_SBR.csv"),
    content = function(file) {
      res <- sbr_result(); req(res, is.null(res$error))
      d <- res$sig_df
      d$phase <- ifelse(d$phase=="pre","Pre-stim",
                 ifelse(d$phase=="stim","Stimulus","Post-stim"))
      write.csv(d[, c("drop_id","phase","position","ratio","background","sbr")],
                file, row.names=FALSE)
    }
  )

  output$has_sbr <- reactive({
    res <- tryCatch(sbr_result(), error=function(e) NULL)
    !is.null(res) && is.null(res$error)
  })
  outputOptions(output, "has_sbr", suspendWhenHidden=FALSE)

  # ── SBR boxplot ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  output$sbr_boxplot <- renderPlot({
    res <- sbr_result(); req(res, is.null(res$error))
    sig_df <- res$sig_df
    phase_cols <- c(pre="#185FA5", stim="#c47d00", post="#27ae60")

    drop_labels <- unique(sig_df[, c("drop_id","phase")])
    drop_labels <- drop_labels[order(drop_labels$drop_id), ]
    drop_labels$label <- mapply(function(id, ph) {
      switch(ph, pre=sprintf("Pre %d",id), stim=sprintf("Stim %d",id),
             post=sprintf("Post %d",id), sprintf("Drop %d",id))
    }, drop_labels$drop_id, drop_labels$phase)

    sig_df$label <- drop_labels$label[match(sig_df$drop_id, drop_labels$drop_id)]
    sig_df$label <- factor(sig_df$label, levels=drop_labels$label)

    # significance stars from Wilcoxon
    st <- sbr_stats()
    star_df <- NULL
    if (!is.null(st)) {
      star_df <- merge(st[, c("drop_id","sig")], drop_labels, by="drop_id")
      star_df$y <- sapply(star_df$drop_id, function(id)
        max(sig_df$sbr[sig_df$drop_id == id], na.rm=TRUE))
      star_df$y <- star_df$y + 0.005
    }

    p <- ggplot(sig_df, aes(x=label, y=sbr, fill=phase)) +
      geom_boxplot(outlier.size=1.5, outlier.alpha=0.6, width=0.55) +
      geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype="dashed", color="grey50", linewidth=0.6) +
      scale_fill_manual(values=phase_cols,
        labels=c(pre="Pre-stim", stim="Stimulus", post="Post-stim"), name=NULL) +
      theme_minimal(base_size=13) +
      theme(
        panel.grid.minor   = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
        axis.title         = element_text(size=11, color="grey40"),
        legend.position    = "top",
        plot.title         = element_text(size=13, face="plain", color="grey35")
      ) +
      labs(x="Droplet", y="SBR  (ratio − background)",
           title="SBR by droplet  —  * p<0.05  ** p<0.01  *** p<0.001 vs Stimulus (Wilcoxon, BH)")

    if (!is.null(star_df) && nrow(star_df) > 0)
      p <- p + geom_text(data=star_df,
                  aes(x=label, y=y, label=sig),
                  inherit.aes=FALSE, size=4, color="#333333", vjust=0)
    p
  }, res=110)

  # ── SBR stats helper ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  sbr_stats <- reactive({
    res <- tryCatch(sbr_result(), error=function(e) NULL)
    if (is.null(res) || !is.null(res$error)) return(NULL)
    sig_df <- res$sig_df

    # find stimulus droplet(s)
    stim_ids <- unique(sig_df$drop_id[sig_df$phase == "stim"])
    if (length(stim_ids) == 0) return(NULL)
    stim_sbr <- sig_df$sbr[sig_df$drop_id == stim_ids[1]]

    # all other droplets
    other_ids <- unique(sig_df$drop_id[sig_df$drop_id != stim_ids[1]])
    if (length(other_ids) == 0) return(NULL)

    results <- do.call(rbind, lapply(other_ids, function(id) {
      ph  <- unique(sig_df$phase[sig_df$drop_id == id])
      lbl <- switch(ph,
        pre  = sprintf("Pre %d",  id),
        post = sprintf("Post %d", id),
        sprintf("Drop %d", id))
      other_sbr <- sig_df$sbr[sig_df$drop_id == id]
      wt <- tryCatch(
        wilcox.test(other_sbr, stim_sbr, exact=FALSE),
        error=function(e) list(statistic=NA, p.value=NA)
      )
      data.frame(
        drop_id   = id,
        label     = lbl,
        phase     = ph,
        n         = length(other_sbr),
        median    = round(median(other_sbr), 6),
        stim_median = round(median(stim_sbr), 6),
        W         = if (!is.na(wt$p.value)) round(wt$statistic, 1) else NA,
        p_value   = wt$p.value,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )
    }))

    # BH correction
    results$p_adj <- p.adjust(results$p_value, method="BH")
    results$sig   <- ifelse(is.na(results$p_adj), "",
                     ifelse(results$p_adj < 0.001, "***",
                     ifelse(results$p_adj < 0.01,  "**",
                     ifelse(results$p_adj < 0.05,  "*", "ns"))))
    results$direction <- ifelse(is.na(results$p_adj) | results$p_adj >= 0.05, "",
                         ifelse(results$median > results$stim_median,
                                "Higher than Stimulus", "Lower than Stimulus"))
    results
  })

  # ── SBR stats table ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  output$sbr_stats_table <- renderDT({
    st <- sbr_stats(); req(st)
    st$phase   <- ifelse(st$phase=="pre","Pre-stim",
                  ifelse(st$phase=="stim","Stimulus","Post-stim"))
    st$p_value <- formatC(st$p_value, format="e", digits=3)
    st$p_adj   <- formatC(st$p_adj,   format="e", digits=3)
    datatable(
      st[, c("label","phase","n","median","W","p_value","p_adj","sig","direction")],
      rownames = FALSE,
      options  = list(dom="t", pageLength=30, ordering=FALSE, tabIndex=-1),
      colnames = c("Droplet","Phase","N frames","Median SBR",
                   "W statistic","p-value","p-adj (BH)","Sig.","Direction")
    ) |>
      formatStyle("sig",
        color = styleEqual(c("***","**","*","ns",""),
                           c("#c0392b","#c0392b","#e67e22","#888","#888")),
        fontWeight = "bold") |>
      formatStyle("direction",
        color = styleEqual(c("Higher than Stimulus","Lower than Stimulus",""),
                           c("#27ae60","#2c6fad","#888")),
        fontWeight = "bold")
  })

  # ── SBR stats download ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  output$dl_sbr_stats <- downloadHandler(
    filename = function()
      paste0(tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(input$file$name)), "_SBR_stats.csv"),
    content = function(file) {
      st <- sbr_stats(); req(st)
      write.csv(st[, c("label","phase","n","median","W","p_value","p_adj","sig","direction")],
                file, row.names=FALSE)
    }
  )

  # ── SBR plot download ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  output$dl_sbr_plot <- downloadHandler(
    filename = function()
      paste0(tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(input$file$name)), "_SBR_boxplot.png"),
    content = function(file) {
      res <- sbr_result(); req(res, is.null(res$error))
      sig_df <- res$sig_df
      phase_cols <- c(pre="#185FA5", stim="#c47d00", post="#27ae60")
      drop_labels <- unique(sig_df[, c("drop_id","phase")])
      drop_labels <- drop_labels[order(drop_labels$drop_id), ]
      drop_labels$label <- mapply(function(id, ph) {
        switch(ph, pre=sprintf("Pre %d",id), stim=sprintf("Stim %d",id),
               post=sprintf("Post %d",id), sprintf("Drop %d",id))
      }, drop_labels$drop_id, drop_labels$phase)
      sig_df$label <- drop_labels$label[match(sig_df$drop_id, drop_labels$drop_id)]
      sig_df$label <- factor(sig_df$label, levels=drop_labels$label)

      st <- sbr_stats()
      star_df <- NULL
      if (!is.null(st)) {
        star_df <- merge(st[, c("drop_id","sig")], drop_labels, by="drop_id")
        star_df$y <- sapply(star_df$drop_id, function(id)
          max(sig_df$sbr[sig_df$drop_id == id], na.rm=TRUE)) + 0.005
      }

      p <- ggplot(sig_df, aes(x=label, y=sbr, fill=phase)) +
        geom_boxplot(outlier.size=1.5, outlier.alpha=0.6, width=0.55) +
        geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype="dashed", color="grey50", linewidth=0.6) +
        scale_fill_manual(values=phase_cols,
          labels=c(pre="Pre-stim", stim="Stimulus", post="Post-stim"), name=NULL) +
        theme_minimal(base_size=13) +
        theme(panel.grid.minor=element_blank(), panel.grid.major.x=element_blank(),
              axis.title=element_text(size=11,color="grey40"), legend.position="top",
              plot.title=element_text(size=13,face="plain",color="grey35")) +
        labs(x="Droplet", y="SBR  (ratio − background)",
             title="SBR by droplet  —  * p<0.05  ** p<0.01  *** p<0.001 vs Stimulus (Wilcoxon, BH)")
      if (!is.null(star_df) && nrow(star_df) > 0)
        p <- p + geom_text(data=star_df, aes(x=label, y=y, label=sig),
                    inherit.aes=FALSE, size=4, color="#333333", vjust=0)
      ggsave(file, plot=p, width=8, height=5, dpi=150)
    }
  )

  # ── Cleaned data reactive ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
  cleaned_df <- reactive({
    req(rv$df, rv$drops)
    d  <- rv$drops[rv$drops$phase != "excluded", ]
    if (nrow(d) == 0) return(NULL)
    df <- rv$df
    do.call(rbind, lapply(seq_len(nrow(d)), function(i) {
      rows <- df[df$frame >= d$start_frame[i] & df$frame <= d$end_frame[i], ]
      if (nrow(rows) == 0) return(NULL)
      rows$phase   <- d$phase[i]
      rows$drop_id <- d$id[i]
      rows
    }))
  })

  # ── Cleaned data plot ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  output$plot_cleaned <- renderPlot({
    cd <- cleaned_df(); req(cd)
    phase_cols <- c(pre="#185FA5", stim="#c47d00", post="#27ae60")
    cd$phase <- factor(cd$phase, levels=c("pre","stim","post"))

    # build segments — break line between non-adjacent droplets
    cd <- cd[order(cd$frame), ]
    cd$drop_id <- factor(cd$drop_id)

    ggplot(cd, aes(x=frame, y=intensity, color=phase, group=drop_id)) +
      geom_line(linewidth=0.8) +
      scale_color_manual(
        values = phase_cols,
        labels = c(pre="Pre-stim", stim="Stimulus", post="Post-stim"),
        name   = NULL
      ) +
      theme_minimal(base_size=12) +
      theme(
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major = element_line(color="grey92"),
        axis.title       = element_text(size=11, color="grey40"),
        legend.position  = "top",
        plot.title       = element_text(size=12, face="plain", color="grey35")
      ) +
      labs(x="Frame", y="Mean grey intensity",
           title="Cleaned data — included droplets only")
  }, res=110)

  # ── Cleaned data table ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  output$cleaned_table <- renderDT({
    cd <- cleaned_df(); req(cd)
    cd_show <- cd[, c("drop_id","phase","frame","intensity")]
    cd_show$phase <- factor(cd_show$phase,
      levels=c("pre","stim","post"),
      labels=c("Pre-stim","Stimulus","Post-stim"))
    cd_show <- cd_show[order(cd_show$frame), ]
    datatable(cd_show, rownames=FALSE,
      options=list(dom="tp", pageLength=15, scrollX=TRUE, tabIndex=-1),
      colnames=c("Drop ID","Phase","Frame","Intensity"))
  })

  # ── Oxygen status ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  output$oxy_status <- renderUI({
    req(rv$oxy_df)
    n <- nrow(rv$oxy_df)
    if (n == 0) return(tags$p(style="font-size:12px;color:#888;margin-top:4px;",
                              "No oxygen blocks detected."))
    total <- sum(rv$oxy_df$end_frame - rv$oxy_df$start_frame + 1)
    tags$p(style="margin-top:6px;font-size:12px;color:#555;",
      tags$span(class="oxy-pill", paste0(n, " O\u2082 blocks")),
      sprintf(" — %d frames removed", total))
  })

  # ── JS view range ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  observeEvent(input$js_view, {
    req(rv$df)
    lo <- max(rv$frame_min, input$js_view$lo)
    hi <- min(rv$frame_max, input$js_view$hi)
    if (hi - lo >= 10) { rv$view_lo <- lo; rv$view_hi <- hi }
  })

  # ── Reset zoom ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  observeEvent(input$reset_zoom, {
    req(rv$df)
    rv$view_lo <- rv$frame_min; rv$view_hi <- rv$frame_max
    session$sendCustomMessage("caInit",
      list(mn=rv$frame_min,mx=rv$frame_max,lo=rv$frame_min,hi=rv$frame_max))
  })

  # ── View info ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  output$view_info <- renderUI({
    req(rv$df)
    span <- rv$view_hi - rv$view_lo
    pct  <- round(100*span/(rv$frame_max - rv$frame_min))
    tags$small(style="color:#888;",
      sprintf("frames %d–%d (%d%%)", round(rv$view_lo), round(rv$view_hi), pct))
  })

  # ── Helper: add region from current brush ─────────────────────────────────
  # ── Add via button ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  observeEvent(input$add_region, {
    req(rv$df, input$brush)
    sf <- round(input$brush$xmin); ef <- round(input$brush$xmax)
    if (is.null(sf) || is.null(ef) || sf >= ef) return()
    rv$drops <- rbind(rv$drops, data.frame(
      id=rv$next_id, start_frame=sf, end_frame=ef,
      n_frames=as.integer(ef-sf+1), phase="pre",
      stringsAsFactors=FALSE))
    rv$drops  <- auto_assign_phases(rv$drops)
    rv$next_id <- rv$next_id + 1L
    session$sendCustomMessage("clearBrush", list())
  })

  # ── Escape: deselect ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  observeEvent(input$escape_key, { rv$selected_id <- NULL })

  # ── Undo / clear ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  observeEvent(input$undo_last, {
    if (nrow(rv$drops) > 0) {
      last_id <- rv$drops$id[nrow(rv$drops)]
      if (!is.null(rv$selected_id) && rv$selected_id == last_id)
        rv$selected_id <- NULL
      rv$drops <- rv$drops[-nrow(rv$drops),]
    }
  })
  observeEvent(input$clear_drops, {
    rv$drops <- rv$drops[0,]; rv$next_id <- 1L; rv$selected_id <- NULL
  })

  # ── Select a drop row ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  observeEvent(input$click_drop_id, {
    req(rv$df)
    cid <- input$click_drop_id
    if (!is.null(rv$selected_id) && rv$selected_id == cid) {
      rv$selected_id <- NULL   # click again to deselect
    } else {
      rv$selected_id <- cid
      # zoom to this region with padding
      r   <- rv$drops[rv$drops$id == cid, ]
      if (nrow(r) == 0) return()
      span <- r$end_frame - r$start_frame
      pad  <- max(span * 0.5, 30)
      lo   <- max(rv$frame_min, r$start_frame - pad)
      hi   <- min(rv$frame_max, r$end_frame   + pad)
      rv$view_lo <- lo; rv$view_hi <- hi
      session$sendCustomMessage("caInit",
        list(mn=rv$frame_min, mx=rv$frame_max, lo=lo, hi=hi))
    }
  })

  # ── Resize selected drop to current brush ─────────────────────────────────
  observeEvent(input$resize_drop, {
    req(rv$selected_id, input$brush)
    sf <- round(input$brush$xmin); ef <- round(input$brush$xmax)
    if (is.null(sf) || sf >= ef) return()
    idx <- which(rv$drops$id == rv$selected_id)
    if (length(idx) == 0) return()
    rv$drops$start_frame[idx] <- sf
    rv$drops$end_frame[idx]   <- ef
    rv$drops$n_frames[idx]    <- as.integer(ef - sf + 1)
    session$sendCustomMessage("clearBrush", list())
  })

  # ── Spacebar: single observer — resize if editing, else add new ───────────
  observeEvent(input$space_add, {
    req(rv$df, input$brush)
    sf <- round(input$brush$xmin); ef <- round(input$brush$xmax)
    if (is.null(sf) || is.null(ef) || sf >= ef) return()

    if (!is.null(rv$selected_id)) {
      # Editing an existing drop → resize it
      idx <- which(rv$drops$id == rv$selected_id)
      if (length(idx) > 0) {
        rv$drops$start_frame[idx] <- sf
        rv$drops$end_frame[idx]   <- ef
        rv$drops$n_frames[idx]    <- as.integer(ef - sf + 1)
      }
    } else {
      # No drop selected → add a new one
      rv$drops <- rbind(rv$drops, data.frame(
        id=rv$next_id, start_frame=sf, end_frame=ef,
        n_frames=as.integer(ef-sf+1), phase="pre",
        stringsAsFactors=FALSE))
      rv$drops  <- auto_assign_phases(rv$drops)
      rv$next_id <- rv$next_id + 1L
    }
    session$sendCustomMessage("clearBrush", list())
  }, ignoreInit=TRUE)

  # ── Delete selected drop ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
  observeEvent(input$delete_drop, {
    req(rv$selected_id)
    rv$drops       <- rv$drops[rv$drops$id != rv$selected_id, ]
    rv$selected_id <- NULL
  })

  # ── Deselect ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  observeEvent(input$deselect_drop, { rv$selected_id <- NULL })

  # ── Cycle phase on phase-pill click ───────────────────────────────────────
  observeEvent(input$cycle_phase_id, {
    req(rv$df)
    cid <- input$cycle_phase_id
    idx <- which(rv$drops$id == cid)
    if (length(idx) == 0) return()
    current <- rv$drops$phase[idx]
    next_phase <- switch(current,
      pre      = "stim",
      stim     = "post",
      post     = "excluded",
      excluded = "pre",
      "pre"
    )
    rv$drops$phase[idx] <- next_phase
  })

  # ── Main plot ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  output$plot_main <- renderPlot({
    req(rv$df, rv$oxy_df)
    lo <- rv$view_lo; hi <- rv$view_hi
    pad  <- (hi - lo) * 0.02
    df_z <- rv$df[rv$df$frame >= (lo-pad) & rv$df$frame <= (hi+pad), ]

    p <- ggplot(df_z, aes(x=frame, y=intensity)) +
      coord_cartesian(xlim=c(lo, hi), expand=FALSE) +
      theme_minimal(base_size=12) +
      theme(
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major = element_line(color="grey92"),
        axis.title       = element_text(size=11, color="grey40"),
        plot.title       = element_text(size=12, face="plain", color="grey35")
      ) +
      labs(x="Frame", y="Mean grey intensity",
           title=paste0(basename(input$file$name),
                        "  ·  frames ", round(lo), "–", round(hi)))

    # Oxygen — amber
    if (!is.null(rv$oxy_df) && nrow(rv$oxy_df) > 0) {
      for (i in seq_len(nrow(rv$oxy_df))) {
        o <- rv$oxy_df[i,]
        p <- p + annotate("rect", xmin=o$start_frame, xmax=o$end_frame,
                   ymin=-Inf, ymax=Inf, fill="#ba7517", alpha=0.20)
        mid <- (o$start_frame + o$end_frame) / 2
        if (mid >= lo && mid <= hi)
          p <- p + annotate("text", x=mid, y=Inf, vjust=1.5, size=2.8,
                     label="O\u2082", color="#7a4e00", fontface="bold")
      }
    }

    # Droplets — colored by phase; selected one gets stronger fill + border
    if (nrow(rv$drops) > 0) {
      sel <- rv$selected_id
      for (i in seq_len(nrow(rv$drops))) {
        d      <- rv$drops[i,]
        is_sel <- !is.null(sel) && !is.na(sel) && d$id == sel
        ph     <- if (!is.null(d$phase) && nzchar(d$phase)) d$phase else "pre"
        pcol   <- phase_color(ph)
        palpha <- if (is_sel) 0.42 else switch(ph, excluded=0.10, 0.22)
        p <- p + annotate("rect", xmin=d$start_frame, xmax=d$end_frame,
                   ymin=-Inf, ymax=Inf, fill=pcol, alpha=palpha)
        if (is_sel)
          p <- p + annotate("rect", xmin=d$start_frame, xmax=d$end_frame,
                     ymin=-Inf, ymax=Inf, fill=NA, color=pcol, linewidth=1.4)
        mid <- (d$start_frame + d$end_frame) / 2
        if (mid >= lo && mid <= hi) {
          lbl <- switch(ph,
            pre      = sprintf("Pre %d", d$id),
            stim     = sprintf("Stim %d", d$id),
            post     = sprintf("Post %d", d$id),
            excluded = sprintf("X %d", d$id),
            sprintf("%d", d$id)
          )
          if (is_sel) lbl <- paste0("▲ ", lbl)
          p <- p + annotate("text", x=mid, y=Inf, vjust=1.5, size=2.8,
                     label=lbl, color=pcol, fontface="bold")
        }
      }
    }

    p + geom_line(color="#185FA5", linewidth=0.7)
  }, res=110)

  # ── Region table ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  output$region_table_ui <- renderUI({
    req(rv$df)
    d   <- rv$drops
    sel <- rv$selected_id

    if (nrow(d) == 0)
      return(tags$p(style="color:#888;font-size:12px;",
                    "No droplet regions marked yet."))

    d_sorted <- d[order(d$start_frame), ]

    rows <- lapply(seq_len(nrow(d_sorted)), function(i) {
      r      <- d_sorted[i,]
      is_sel <- !is.null(sel) && !is.na(sel) && r$id == sel
      ph     <- if (!is.null(r$phase) && nzchar(r$phase)) r$phase else "pre"
      pcol   <- phase_color(ph)
      pill_label <- switch(ph, pre="Pre-stim", stim="Stimulus", post="Post-stim", excluded="Excluded", ph)
      tags$tr(
        class   = if(is_sel) "drop-row selected" else "drop-row",
        onclick = sprintf(
          "Shiny.setInputValue('click_drop_id',%d,{priority:'event'})", r$id),
        tags$td(style="padding:4px 10px 4px 0; color:#999; font-size:11px;", r$id),
        tags$td(style="padding:4px 10px 4px 0;",
          tags$span(
            style=sprintf(
              "background:%s;color:white;padding:1px 8px;border-radius:3px;font-size:11px;font-weight:500;cursor:pointer;",
              pcol),
            onclick=sprintf(
              "event.stopPropagation();Shiny.setInputValue('cycle_phase_id',%d,{priority:'event'})",
              r$id),
            title="Click to cycle phase",
            pill_label
          )
        ),
        tags$td(style="padding:4px 10px 4px 0;", r$start_frame),
        tags$td(style="padding:4px 10px 4px 0;", r$end_frame),
        tags$td(style="padding:4px 10px 4px 0;", r$n_frames),
        tags$td(style="padding:4px 4px 4px 0; color:#2c6fad; font-size:11px;",
                if(is_sel) "▲ editing" else "edit")
      )
    })

    tbl <- tags$table(
      style="border-collapse:collapse;font-size:12px;width:auto;",
      tags$thead(tags$tr(lapply(
        c("ID","","Start","End","# frames",""), function(h)
          tags$th(style="text-align:left;padding:4px 10px 4px 0;
                         border-bottom:1px solid #ccc; color:#666;", h)
      ))),
      tags$tbody(rows)
    )

    # ── Edit panel ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    edit_ui <- NULL
    if (!is.null(sel) && !is.na(sel) && sel %in% d$id) {
      r <- d[d$id == sel, ]
      edit_ui <- div(class="edit-panel",
        div(class="edit-title",
            sprintf("✏  Editing Drop %d", r$id)),
        div(class="edit-frames",
            sprintf("frames  %d – %d  (%d frames)", r$start_frame, r$end_frame, r$n_frames)),
        div(class="edit-hint",
          "Drag a new selection on the plot, then press ",
          tags$b("Space"), " or click ", tags$b("Resize"),
          " to update the boundaries."
        ),
        fluidRow(
          column(4,
            actionButton("resize_drop","↔ Resize to selection",
                         class="btn-primary btn-sm", width="100%")),
          column(3,
            actionButton("delete_drop","🗑 Delete",
                         class="btn-danger btn-sm", width="100%")),
          column(3,
            actionButton("deselect_drop","✕ Done",
                         class="btn-default btn-sm", width="100%"))
        )
      )
    }

    tagList(tbl, edit_ui)
  })

  # ── Summary table ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  output$summary_table <- renderDT({
    req(rv$df)
    d <- rv$drops
    if (nrow(d) == 0)
      return(datatable(data.frame(message="No droplet regions marked yet."),
                       options=list(dom="t", tabIndex=-1), rownames=FALSE))
    df <- rv$df
    win_df <- do.call(rbind, lapply(seq_len(nrow(d)), function(i) {
      w <- df[df$frame >= d$start_frame[i] & df$frame <= d$end_frame[i], ]
      if (nrow(w) == 0) return(NULL)
      data.frame(
        window         = paste0("Drop ", d$id[i]),
        start_frame    = w$frame[1],
        end_frame      = w$frame[nrow(w)],
        n_frames       = nrow(w),
        mean_intensity = round(mean(w$intensity), 2),
        sd_intensity   = round(sd(w$intensity),   2),
        min_intensity  = round(min(w$intensity),  2),
        max_intensity  = round(max(w$intensity),  2)
      )
    }))
    if (is.null(win_df) || nrow(win_df) == 0)
      return(datatable(data.frame(message="No frames in marked regions.")))
    datatable(win_df, rownames=FALSE,
              options=list(dom="tp", pageLength=20, scrollX=TRUE,
                           keys=FALSE, tabIndex=-1),
              colnames=c("Window","Start","End","# frames","Mean","SD","Min","Max"))
  })

  # ── Downloads ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  output$dl_cleaned <- downloadHandler(
    filename = function()
      paste0(tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(input$file$name)), "_droplets_data.csv"),
    content = function(file) {
      req(rv$df)
      d <- rv$drops; df <- rv$df
      if (nrow(d) == 0) { write.csv(data.frame(), file, row.names=FALSE); return() }
      keep <- rep(FALSE, nrow(df))
      for (i in seq_len(nrow(d)))
        keep <- keep | (df$frame >= d$start_frame[i] & df$frame <= d$end_frame[i])
      write.csv(df[keep, c("frame","intensity")], file, row.names=FALSE)
    }
  )
  output$dl_regions <- downloadHandler(
    filename = function()
      paste0(tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(input$file$name)), "_droplet_regions.csv"),
    content = function(file)
      write.csv(rv$drops[, c("id","start_frame","end_frame","n_frames")],
                file, row.names=FALSE)
  )
}

shinyApp(ui, server)
```
